title: Wired Organza Ribbon Roll in 30mm, 50mm & 70mm Widths – Sheer Chiffon Craft Ribbon for Christmas Tree, Wreath Making, Gift Wrapping, Bows & Wedding Decor (Navy, 50mm)
features: 🎨 CHOOSE YOUR PERFECT WIDTH & COLOUR | Your search ends here. We are the one-stop shop for premium wired ribbon, offering a huge range of vibrant colours in three versatile widths: delicate 30mm (3cm), all-purpose 50mm (5cm), and statement-making 70mm (7cm). Select the exact size and shade you need to bring your creative vision to life.

🎄 THE ULTIMATE CHRISTMAS DECORATING RIBBON | Dominate the festive season with the perfect ribbon for every task. Use our extra-wide 70mm for show-stopping Christmas tree topper bows and grand garlands. The popular 50mm is your go-to for beautiful wreath bows and festive displays. Our nimble 30mm is ideal for wrapping smaller gifts, tree ornaments, and adding detail.

💍 STUNNING WEDDING & EVENT STYLING | Create breathtaking, professional-looking event decor. The luxurious 70mm makes for dramatic, wide chair sashes and archway drapes. The classic 50mm is perfect for standard sashes and pew ends, while the elegant 30mm is the top choice for wrapping favour boxes, bouquet stems, and finishing wedding stationery.

🎁 PROFESSIONAL GIFT WRAPPING & HAMPERS | Achieve a flawless, high-end finish on every gift. The wired edge on all our sizes ensures crisp, perfect bows that hold their shape. Use our wide ribbons for large gift boxes and hamper baskets, and the narrow ribbon for smaller presents and bottle tags. This is the essential supply for "luxury gift wrapping".

✅ PREMIUM QUALITY, GENEROUS 20M ROLL | No matter the width you choose, you receive a continuous 20-metre roll of shimmering, sheer chiffon organza ribbon. The strong, flexible wired edge makes crafting a joy, not a chore. As a trusted UK seller, we provide fast, reliable dispatch on all our florist and haberdashery supplies.
description: UNLOCK YOUR CREATIVITY WITH THE PERFECT RIBBON FOR EVERY PROJECT Why settle for one-size-fits-all? We offer a complete range of professional-grade wired organza ribbon, ensuring you have the exact tool you need to achieve stunning results. From delicate details to grand statements, our collection of 30mm, 50mm, and 70mm widths in a vast array of colours makes us the ultimate destination for crafters, decorators, and florists. THE RIGHT SIZE FOR EVERY IMAGINATION: 30mm (3cm) - The Detailer: This narrow wired ribbon is your secret weapon for fine, intricate work. It's the perfect choice for small gift wrapping, decorating cake tiers, wrapping bouquet stems, creating delicate bows for favour boxes, and all your detailed craft and haberdashery projects. 50mm (5cm) - The All-Rounder: Our most popular and versatile width. This is the go-to, all-purpose ribbon for classic Christmas wreath bows, medium-to-large gift wrapping, standard wedding chair sashes, and impactful floral arrangements. If you need one ribbon that does it all, this is it. 70mm (7cm) - The Show-Stopper: When you need to make a bold statement, reach for our extra-wide ribbon. This is engineered for creating magnificent, oversized Christmas tree topper bows, dramatic garlands, luxurious wide chair sashes, and even car bows. It’s designed for maximum visual impact. YOUR ESSENTIAL SUPPLY FOR CHRISTMAS, WEDDINGS & BEYOND Get ahead of the festive rush with the ultimate Christmas decorating supply. Our multi-width range covers every possible need. For wedding and event planners, our vast colour and size selection allows for perfect theme matching. For everyday gift wrapping and floristry, our ribbon adds a touch of class that sets your work apart. Don't compromise. Select your perfect width and colour from the menu above and click ‘Add to Basket’ now to secure the highest quality wired ribbon for all your creative endeavours.
